title: Fast Copy columns for Viewers

posts.author: Flaviomian (Flavio Mian)
posts.cookedHtml:
This feature would be for non-members: Viewers profile

The member with this profile have to right click the desired column, then select “Copy”. Like this:

Could be possible to: with a single left-click automatically copy the desired column to the clipboard?

This feature already exists on the “Element ID”, when you click it it auto-copy to clipboard

Here’s an example:
